items.title: Introspective Access or Retrospective Inference? Mind-Wandering Reports Are Shaped by Performance Feedback

items.content: <article>Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. Most mind-wandering paradigms use self-reports following task performance, but the extent to which these reports are confounded by performance cues is unknown.
